errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid e-mail address
errors.connection: Could not reach the server. Please check your connection.
errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.

connect.title: Connect to your server
connect.subtitle: Hivora is self-hosted. Enter the URL of your organization's Hivora server to get started.
connect.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid http(s) URL
connect.failed: Could not connect to this server. Please verify the URL.

setup.title: Set up your server
setup.subtitle: This server hasn't been configured yet. Create the organization and the first administrator account.

projects.title: Projects
projects.body: Organize your efforts and track issues on your own terms — with custom workflows per project.

time.title: Time Tracking
time.body: Monitor and report time spent on different projects and various activity types.

gantt.title: Gantt Charts
gantt.body: Create and update your project plans on an interactive timeline with dependencies.

timesheets.title: Timesheets
timesheets.body: Track work activity for yourself and the members of your team, week by week.

boards.title: Agile Boards
boards.body: Plan and prioritize your development on a board that mirrors your team's process.

reports.title: Reports
reports.body: Collect and summarize insightful bits of information about your projects.

dashboards.title: Dashboards
dashboards.body: Monitor activity in all of your projects at a glance — tasks, progress and performance.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.body: Build a collection of articles that cover everything your team needs to know.

auth.subtitle: Sign in to continue
auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many failed attempts. Please try again later.

update.title: Update required
update.body: Your app version {{current}} is older than the minimum version {{required}} required by this server. Please update the app to continue.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your day at a glance
dashboard.noTasks: No urgent tasks for today — enjoy!
dashboard.noRanking: No resolved issues in the last 30 days yet.

issues.noDescription: No description yet. Double-tap to add one.
issues.editTitleHint: Double-tap the title or description to edit.
issues.title: Title
issues.deleteBody: {{id}} will be permanently deleted, including comments and work items.
issues.author: Author
issues.label: Label
issues.deleteLabelConfirm: Delete "{{name}}" from this project? It will be removed from every issue that uses it.

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.emptyTitle: Drop files here, or click to upload
attachments.emptyHint: Images preview inline · any file type · up to {{size}} MB
attachments.noPreview: No inline preview for this type
attachments.tooManyFiles: You can upload at most {{count}} files at once.
attachments.batchTooLarge: The selection exceeds the {{size}} MB total limit.
attachments.blocked: {{name}} can't be uploaded — file type not allowed.
attachments.removeConfirm: Remove this file? This can't be undone.

projects.title: Projects
projects.empty: No projects yet. Create the first one!
projects.name: Project name
projects.keyHelp: Short code used for issue IDs, e.g. ASTA → ASTA-42
projects.newSubtitle: Set it up now — tune workflow & labels in settings after.
projects.defaultWorkflowInfo: Starts with the default workflow — Backlog → Open → In Progress → In Review → Done (resolved: Done) — editable any time in Project settings.

board.title: Agile Boards
board.name: Board name
board.emptyProject: No boards for this project yet.
board.timelineEmpty: Nothing to show on the timeline.
board.createSub: Set it up now, fill it from the backlog after.
board.typeKanbanDesc: Continuous flow — no fixed timeboxes. Pull tasks across columns one after another.
board.typeScrumDesc: Project management in fixed sprints (2–4 weeks). Plan work from the backlog into each sprint.

gantt.title: Timeline
gantt.subtitle: Gantt view with dependencies
gantt.empty: No scheduled issues. Set start and due dates on issues to see them on the timeline.

timesheet.title: Timesheet
timesheet.empty: No work items recorded in this week.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Project insights
reports.empty: No data for this report yet.

knowledge.title: Knowledge base
knowledge.empty: No articles yet. Share your team's knowledge!

search.placeholder: Search issues, projects, people…  or type a command

empty.title: Search anything in Hivora
empty.subtitle: Find issues, projects, people, boards and docs — or run a command. Start typing.

search.noMatchSub: Try a different term, an issue id like HIV-241, or a command name.

admin.title: Admin area
admin.subtitle: Settings take effect immediately — no restart required.
admin.localizationHint: Default timezone and language for new users.
admin.ssoHint: Connect your identity provider (e.g. Synology SSO via OpenID Connect or SAML).
admin.oidcSubtitle: OpenID Connect — recommended for Synology, Keycloak, Authentik
admin.smtpHint: Used for all transactional e-mails (issue notifications, invites).
admin.emailIngestHint: Polls an IMAP mailbox and converts new e-mails into issues automatically.
admin.imapSubtitle: IMAP — polls inbox and creates issues from incoming mail
admin.pushHint: Mobile push via Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM).
admin.fcmSubtitle: Requires a Firebase project with a service account JSON key.
admin.fcmDocHint: Download the service account JSON from Firebase console → Project settings → Service accounts.
admin.bruteForceHint: Locks accounts temporarily after repeated failed login attempts.
admin.rateLimitSubtitle: Limits API requests per IP to prevent abuse.
admin.sessionPolicyHint: How long users stay signed in without activity.
admin.owaspNote: Hivora enforces OWASP Top 10 protections by default. The settings above allow further hardening for your specific environment.
admin.auditLogHint: Every admin action and login event will be listed here with timestamps and actor details.
admin.secretHint: Leave blank to keep the stored value
admin.deleteConfirmBody: This permanently deletes the account and revokes all access. Assigned issues will be unassigned. This action cannot be undone.
admin.deleteFinalBody: To confirm, type the username {{username}} below. {{name}} will be permanently deleted.

create.title: Create sprint
create.sub: Set it up now, fill it from the backlog after.

start.title: Start {{name}}
start.sub: Lock the scope and begin the timebox.

complete.title: Complete {{name}}
complete.sub: Review the outcome and re-home unfinished work.

sprint.name: Sprint name
sprint.goalHint: What outcome should this sprint deliver?
sprint.dragHere: Drag issues here to plan this sprint, or add one below.
sprint.noActiveSub: Start a sprint from the Planning tab to run the board.
sprint.noInsights: Start a sprint to see its insights.
sprint.noBurndown: Set sprint dates to see the burndown.
sprint.noBreakdown: No estimated work in this sprint.
sprint.netScope: Net scope change: {{delta}} pts since sprint start.

toast.created: “{{name}}” created — add issues from the backlog.

teams.title: Teams
teams.newHint: Group people and grant project access
teams.createSubtitle: You'll be its first Team-Admin. Add people & projects next.
teams.editSubtitle: Edit how this team appears across the workspace.
teams.deleteSubtitle: This removes the team and its memberships.
teams.deleteWarn: Projects are not deleted — they return to the workspace. {{count}} members will lose this team's access.
teams.name: Team name

access.someHint: Choose exactly what they can see
access.noneHint: Add them now, grant access later

teams.everyoneOnTeam: Everyone is already on this team.
teams.roleHintAdmin: Can manage members, projects & settings of this team.
teams.roleHintMember: Can view and work on the projects you grant below.
teams.noProjectsYet: This team has no projects yet.
teams.lastAdminHint: A team needs at least one Team-Admin — promote someone else first.
teams.addProjectSubtitle: Attach an existing project or spin up a new one for {{name}}.
teams.allProjectsAttached: Every project is already on this team.
teams.detachConfirm: Remove {{name}} from this team? Members lose access granted through this team.
teams.adminsOnlyHint: Only Team-Admins and platform administrators can change team settings.
teams.permAdmin: Full control of this team — members, projects, settings. Same rights as a platform admin, scoped to {{name}}.
teams.permMember: Work on the projects they're granted. Can't change team membership or settings.
teams.deleteThisHint: Removes the team and all memberships. Projects stay in the workspace.

projectSettings.title: Project settings
projectSettings.leadsNote: Star a member to make them a project lead. At least one lead is required.
projectSettings.labelsNote: Reusable tags for issues — rename, recolor or remove.
projectSettings.workflowNote: The columns an issue moves through. Toggle Resolved for states that count as done. Minimum 2 states and 1 resolved.
projectSettings.archiveNote: Archived projects are hidden from the active list and read-only, but never deleted.
projectSettings.toastLeadRequired: A project needs at least one lead
projectSettings.toastResolvedRequired: Keep at least one resolved state
projectSettings.toastMinStates: A workflow needs at least 2 states
projectSettings.migrateBody: Choose a status to move the issues from "{{name}}" into — only then can it be removed.
projectSettings.migrateManualHint: You can also move the issues manually before deleting the status.
